strategy_summary: Females of giant water bug species glue eggs to their mates' backs via bodily secretions that act as a type of waterproof glue. “Using bodily secretions, the female [giant water bug] glues the eggs to her mate’s back.” (Crump 2005:52)  Crump, M.
mechanism:
Females of giant water bug species glue eggs to their mates' backs via bodily secretions that act as a type of waterproof glue.

“Using bodily secretions, the female [giant water bug] glues the eggs to her mate’s back.” (Crump 2005:52)

Crump, M. 2005. Headless Males Make Great Lovers & Other Unusual Natural Histories. University of Chicago Press, Chicago, IL. 199 pp.
